lane: Lane 1 — unified tiled Q8_0 prefill GEMM owner (v1, AVX2 + weight-resident cache blocking)
host: win i7-11800H (8C/16T Tiger Lake, AVX2+AVX-512+VNNI, ~16 GiB DDR4, RTX 3060 6GB hidden)
flag: CAMELID_X86_Q8_MATMUL_OWNER = off(default) | ffn_down | all; companion CAMELID_X86_Q8_MATMUL_OWNER_AVX2 (default-on-when-owner-on)
method: bench-generate (in-binary, default plan, CUDA hidden, KV pinned), greedy temp=0, ~516-token prompt. Focused 3-iter runs (the full median-of-5 validation was interrupted; TinyLlama completed). llama reference = llama-bench pp512 -r5.

parity.kernel_bit_identity: PASS — to_bits() == packed-rows4 matmul baseline across rows {4,5,8,13,16} x roles {ffn_down, linear, attention_k} (unit test q8_unified_owner_prefill_is_bit_identical_to_packed_matmul)
parity.end_to_end_greedy: PASS — first_divergent_generated_token_index == -1 (owner off vs on) on TinyLlama-1.1B-Q8 and Llama-3.2-3B-Q8; identical generated token IDs and text

prefill_tok_s.note: Owner OFF (default shipping path) vs ON (CAMELID_X86_Q8_MATMUL_OWNER=all). Effect SCALES WITH WEIGHT SIZE: regresses on small models (cache-resident, only the new-path overhead), wins on large models (weight exceeds cache, residency fix bites).

decode_tok_s.note: Owner is prefill-only (fires for rows>=4; decode rows=1 returns None -> default path). Decode generated tokens are bit-identical; any tok/s delta is measurement noise.

verdict: HONEST PARTIAL. The unified tiled owner is bit-exact and parity-certified, and gives a size-scaling prefill win (+5% on 4B), but cache-blocking alone does NOT close the gap to llama.cpp (still ~0.71x->0.75x on 4B). The residual is llama's AVX-512/VNNI register-tiled compute, NOT the cache/bandwidth axis v1 addresses. Default-off; not promotable (Windows-only; both-host pending).
next_lever_v2: AVX-512/VNNI dpbusd register-tiled microkernel (llama's tinyBLAS technique). Bit-exact-preservable (integer dot is order-free). RISK: AVX-512 downclocks on this Tiger-Lake box (prior AVX-512 decode work regressed and was reverted) -> v2's fairness needs the Ubuntu/server host where AVX-512 usually wins clean. Gate + measure both hosts before any promotion.
